reviews.text:
Do not fall for this KIM REED "attorney" she will not give you the right time a day .. once you pay her fees, she avoid communicating with you !!  Cunning, and not helpful with your legal issue at all!
GO FIND ANOTHER ATTORNEY!! do not trust her>>!

I would like to express how wonderful Kim and her staff are.  They helped though a difficult process and brought much needed relief.  They are highly professional, easy to talk to, she really listens and care.  Highly recommend.
Stay away alert!!! Do not recommend. Did not  give lawful help fight for the rights for me.  I even have to review the angreement and do corrections for them repeatedly.
Delt with my divorce there. Very little help or much needed input. Ghosted me for three months. Do not recommend.

Wanted $5,000 to process a Will that we already completed the forms.

A Will we paid them to write!

We walked out.

I told them they should be ashamed of themselves.  :(
Reed Law was wonderful in helping my mother and I with some legal matters regarding my father's passing. They were caring and helpful with all of our questions. I highly recommended.

A sign of o good Law Firm isn't what they do when everything is going well but what they do when there are stresses between the client and the lawyer. Well even though this client didn't see eye to eye with Atty Reed she responded to our concerns with professionalism and voluntarily offered to resolve our disagreement in a very acceptable manner. I highly recommend this Firm.

Very professional law practice but personable. Gave great legal advice as to how to amend my trust to accomplish my changes. Second time using this practice and will continue to return as I make life changes.
Great team. Always available for questions and concerns. Will meet all expectations.

Mrs. Reed handled my case for nearly 3 years and she and her team didn’t miss a beat. I have full custody of my boys thanks to Kim Reed, I am eternally grateful and would recommend to anyone with custody and family law issues. Best in the panhandle!!!

I had a very unusual family law case and Mrs Reed was highly recommended to me by her peers and other legal professionals from Bay, Gulf, and Franklin county.
Mrs Reed and her staff were always very professional, friendly, knowledgeable, and up front.
I would definitely use her firm again if I ever need any legal advice or representation.
Everyone I encountered was amazingly knowledgeable & friendly. My attorney was a superstar!
Very fair prices an answered all questions we had.

I have never been through a custody battle but I have heard of some horrible cases. When I was served I knew I had to get a lawyer I could trust. They would be fighting for my babies. I totally felt at peace the first time I had met Mrs. Reed. She listened and gave me hope. I had to tell her things from my past that never did I want to talk about and she never made me feel judge . She stood by my side through the whole thing. We agreed on a agreement on mediation but the other parent did not hold up his end of the deal so Mrs reed got me in front of the judge very quickly. She did EVERYTHING she said she was going to do and quickly. I would never use another lawyer again only Mrs Reed. I loved everyone in her office. Stephanie is so sweet and she helped me through a lot along with Mrs. Reed. Everyone in there really cares and wants what's best for the kids. Thank you sooooooooooo much Mrs Reed!!!

Child custody is timely and emotionally draining. If you want someone who is not only knowledgeable, but kind, I would strongly recommend Kim Reed and her team. Kim and her paralegal, Stephanie, proved to me repeatedly that their primary concern was making sure that my daughter had the perfect parenting plan for our very difficult long distance situation. Should I ever need them in the future, I would absolutely hire Reed Law again!
Absolutely amazing and understanding.  We've been in contact with them since 2012 and still to this day receive emailed from Mrs. Reed and her wonderful staff.
Great family law attorney's...

MS. Reed gave my son a chance at life! I am a single father and Ms. Reed made that happen and my son is in gifted and talented, a 2 sport athlete and attends Church on Sunday. Had Ms. Reed not kicked butt in court(constantly) , this would not of been possible. And she isn't my first lawyer. She is awesome! 4 years later...

This practice cost my niece her child. If you value your family use a different law firm as they did nothing proactive yet charged thousands simply being reactive which caused her to go into court without representation and she lost her child to whom of course she has been the primary care giver for the 6 years of her life! An amazing single mom who is a pediatric oncology nurse working hard not only for her child but for others as well.

With family matters you want to be able to trust your attorney/paralegal....this lady is not to be trusted. Post paid retainer this lady became dismissive, rude, and unprofessional...not what I paid for. My case was ultimately (and quickly) handled by another attorney.

This is the worst law group I have ever came across. In the consultation with Sekou you are told the basic and it sounds like the way to go. You are introduced to a loan place and you are able to sign up and his fees are payed. After that its a para legal that reach out to you and they are treating you as if you should know what to do. They email all the forms and documents with no explanation or guidance and then when you try to call no one answers. Its a rip off my $10000 just went down the drain. When requesting to talk to Sekou you are told you have to go through a paralegal and to speak to that person you have to make an appointment which is 2 weeks away and then he/she will decide if you can speak to Sekou. This place is a rip off do not make the mistake of using them for your service. Do what you wish with the information
Very unprofessional, Leslie the paralegal can not even fill out a proper I864.. further more they will not return my calls but sure could take my $4000.00. save yourself and find a different lawyer
I can attest that is law firm know what they are doing and now to get the job done, they will not take a case that they know is not possible to win

reviews.text:
Are you looking for paralegal to do your case? Well this law firm is the place to be. The moment you speak to Sekou and he accepts your case, you will never hear from him again.
He will charge you $10, 000 for the case and tells you that he knows of a company that can give you a payment plan. What he doesn't tell you is that the interest rates are 210%+ so over a 6 year period you will have that $10gs + $11gs in interest to repay (there are more expensive packages).  Here is the kicker, the late fee of $780 comes 1 week after that consultation IF NOT PAID IN FULL, which you were not aware of.  Another service fee of $250.
Would not encourage anyone to use this law firm.  He is a "internet lawyer", not your lawyer. Do what you wish with the information provided. In wish I had know before hand.

reviews.text: He was an amazing attorney! Best I've ever had! He actually cares!
Quality attorney.   I use him for all my legal needs.   Two thumbs up

After receiving my 2nd denial on my Disability Claim, I contacted Atty. Trucks' office. His Executive Assistant, Shirley, stated, "I'm going to be your best friend!", and she wasn't exaggerating. THEY handled EVERYTHING!!! They compiled my medical records from ALL of my Drs., explained each step of my continued claim, policies, procedures, and steps to achieve a favorable judgment. After I no longer qualified for Obamacare medical coverage, (due to my lack of work) they wrote a letter requesting my judge hearing be expedited since I was losing medical insurance.  I received a court date in front of a Judge in 3 months vs 16 months!  I felt the Judge was a little harsh, but Karl took control and addressed issues I never would have thought of...HE KNOWS THE LAW!!! He shot holes through all of the career expert's responses, and proved that my medical conditions prevented me from continued full-time employment...referencing hundreds of documents in my file! I received approval of my disability claim in 2 Days!!!  I highly recommend the services of Karl Trucks. I have always been a hard worker, and perfectionist, and it is really difficult for me to leave something as important as my livelihood in the hands of another. I know what it feels like to lose your ability to work and provide for yourself, and it is extremely frightening. If you are in this situation, you can take a deep breath and RELAX, if you hire Karl Trucks. Karl and Shirley are Experts in this field, and I will use them again should anything challenge my disability claim in the future. Call Them...You Will Be In Good Hands!  Thanks Karl and Shirley - You will Never know how much your are appreciated!!!   Robin R. Black
I would like to thank Mr. Trucks and his staff for all their help with my case. Thank you for all the help Shirley Falls god bless you.

Mike McLeod and his Team did a great job. We got the maximum amount of $$  and he got it done faster than expected. Great Experience. If u need help with accident call Mike McLeod. He gets RESULTS !!!!!

If you have no hope these are the people to turn to!!! My daughter of 2 (Kayla) and Me were in a car accident. Me being a single Mother and barely having any money to my name, we had no where to turn!!! Mr. McLeod gave us a free consultation and excepted our case. Relief washed over me and I could concentrate on taking care of my little girl.

Mr. McLeod is a strong willed lawyer, who gets the job done!!! He has never been too busy to return our phone calls. He is very professional and knowledgeable. He has helped us numerous times, over the years and has never charged us a single dime. He is Truly Amazing!!!

If you are reading this, you are probably nervous, scared, anxious, angry, sad, and upset. You don't research attorneys for fun. I, unfortunately, have required an attorney more times than i can count... literally. However, i haven't had to retain my attorney that many times. I say this because Rachel Seaton and Traci (not girard virga) are not only my legal defense, they aren't just my friends, they protect the course in which my and my child's life travels. I have come to realize that a true attorney/ client relationship is a special relationship. I love these two ladies. They get to know you as a person and can actually predict how you think, what you feel, how you will react, and why you may have done something. To me, they are like family. Before i keep rambling, these two ladies can make those scared, tense, feelings when you've been charged with A crime or are seeking custody of a child, feel at ease. Best attorney I've ever met. I've gotten council so many times without retainer I feel as if I've taken advantage. They've showed up at at my hospital bed after icu crash. They've cared, and pushed me to change flaws in my character. Ive not listened to a couple pieces of advice they've given me, both times they predicted exactly what i never thought was going to happen. Rachel and Traci are worth more than money.

Please know most of the reviews are regarding Mr. Virga.  As for Ms. Seaton, I would NOT recommend her.  I could write a novella as to why, but I won't.  What I do know, is she monetarily took advantage of me and I have had other attorneys confirm this.  Not once did I ever receive a statement of services rendered.  Somehow, 7k just disappeared into this air and then she withdrew from counsel.  I filed a complaint with the Florida Bar and she lied to the Bar.

reviews.text:
I have been a local most of my life, before serving in special operations for 5 years, and returning to Panama City, ultimately receiving a masters in social work, before serving the local area for 8 years, as a therapist and counselor. Primarily veterans, but also kids with autism :)

I unfortunately am writing to try and make more potential clients aware of some of my experiences, especially after noticing some reviews endorsing this place happen to be attorneys and other legal affiliates, instead of formal clients, which is very unethical.

I came to Faye when she was still practicing out of a building near the Navy Base on the beach, and advertising from her Gunter Legal site. I had my VA forms meticulously organized, and all the clinical info and DSM contrasts needed to highlight previous areas of discrepancy in my unfavorable VA decisions. I was impressed by Faye the first time I met her, as she was very good at talking a big game.

Sadly, over the next year, there would be an extreme lack of transparency, an awkward e mail where she blamed the VA for losing my submissions for a claim that should have been a year old or more. I used my MyHealtheVet premium account to verify that no submission had ever been made on my behalf, after Faye brought up this issue, claiming it had been in the system and then "deleted" by the VA.

Over the next month, I followed up with VA staff on the general info line, learning how to track Faye's submissions and work on my behalf through MyHealtheVet Premium / Gold. Faye had  been resistant to my requests to review this information with me, citing that her other clients never requested or received such a service. Please note: the photo attached is advertising the same services Faye insisted other clients didn't receive, and that she resisted providing me with.

I had voiced many concerns over the next few months, before I terminated her service, that she was pushing the evidence towards a rating that was not in line with what I had been advocating towards for the past decade, She labeled these concerns as redundant in an e mail my VA judge was kind enough to review with me and consider, during my hearing.

After Faye again refused to give me information on what info had been submitted, and refused my request to terminate services the day I asked (or even explain how I could do so on my own to save her time). I was able to talk to a nice woman on the VA hotline, once more, and send a very crudely drawn paper to the VA that invoked my right to terminate representation. Faye had said that she would submit the termination the coming Monday, but after I followed up a few hours later, showing her I had taken initiative on my own, in the absence of client education and assistance, she was able to submit the same thing to the VA within minutes, and I still show people those correspondences, too.

The time lost through Faye didn't override my request or cause any confusion with my case, and the emergency escalation I had requested due to financial struggles was approved within two weeks. Faye had insisted that the VA always takes years, and my knowledge of how to advocate or appeal was regularly overlooked or flat-out ignored. My disability was approved after submitting the very same evidence Faye had resisted discussing or reviewing, when I was still struggling to understand why everything was progressing so differently than we discussed. I had a hospitalization for a suicide attempt she was "too busy with other clients," to submit, as well.

Some attorneys do think they are a higher class of person than their clients, and the worst thing you can do is let someone like that represent you. You will suffer greatly, and wait longer than most. Your pleas for assistance will cause you to be looked down on, and you will be treated even more like a lower form of person. Check the date of bar certification in your state database as well, you will find it often contrasts with their advertised "decades of experience," and they are educated enough to know they are giving you a false impression.

Approximately three years ago, my son hired Mr. Grabner to represent him in a custody suit on behalf of our two year old grandson.  I had heard a number of good things about Mr. Grabner and, in the beginning, was very impressed with his legal thoroughness, tenacity, and knowledge.  In the last year or so, something changed in Mr. Grabner's demeanor and approach to our case.  Admittedly, my son could be a difficult client (if only due to his concerns over the wellbeing of his son/my grandson), however, I’m aware of some personal event(s) in Mr. Grabner’s life that very well affected his attention to at least my son’s case.  This in Mr. Grabner’s approach to his legal practice was also noted to me by at least one other person who’s involved in the judicial process.
Mr. Grabner last represented my son during a contempt hearing in June of this year.  During this hearing and although he had subpoenaed  a professional counselor as a witness on my son’s behalf, Mr. Grabner failed to call the witness to testify and refused to present any evidence of contempt action(s) against the other party.
We didn’t realize the gravity of Mr. Grabner’s actions (or lack thereof) until a recent action brought by the other party against my son for contempt of court.  The presiding judge ruled strongly against my son in this most recent matter, I firmly believe, in great part to Mr. Grabner’s previous legal inefficiency.
I certainly hope that Mr. a Grabner is able to change his professional course!

The case Mr. Guy Tunnell is referring to is Bay County case 15-1163DR, Bradley R. Tunnell vs. Melissa L. Goodson.

The court's record of the case is viewable at Courts.baycoclerk.com

The order that Mr. Guy Tunnell is complaining about is docket item 224, filed October 15, 2019. You may request access to the order, and all of the other documents. The clerk of court will confirm that there is no confidential information within the document, then make it available to you.

I recently filed a long term healthcare claim with our insurance provider.  For months the provider continually denied our claim citing all kinds of reasons.

I typically do my best to resolve my own issues and avoid attorneys whenever possible. After being out matched by the insurance company, I decided it was time to enlist the service of an attorney.

After calling several different law firms, a respected criminal attorney referred me to Brian. Upon meeting Mr. Davidson, I knew I was talking with the right guy.  After one meeting he went to work on my case.  Almost immediately he was able to get the insurance company to comply.  Shortly thereafter, the insurance checks were in the mail!

His firm may appear small. He's certainly not the biggest. Based on my experience, I would call his firm "the right size"!  His clients are people, not a number.  It's Quality over quantity.

Marc Rice
Mexico Beach, FL

She knew we had a lot to do in a short time and immediately gave me the information needed and they got to work. Although hard to put a price on adoption, the reality is it can be and is costly. As pricing goes they are very reasonable. One of my other consultations was considerably higher. High enough for us that I thought we may not be able to afford this adoption. Ashley was recommended to me by a friend and I was a bit hesitant since I had never heard her name before but calling her was literally life changing. She is very kind and patient. She worked with me financially and was always there when I had questions or concerns and never made me feel like she was too busy to take my calls as some lawyers may seem. Ultimately, my case ended in my favor because she took the extra steps to make sure my voice was heard. Not only did she change the outcome of my pending court case, but also the course of my life. If I ever needed legal representation in the future, she is the first person I would call. Highly recommend!!!!

Waylon took our call and met with us promptly.  That was good but we think only bc he wanted the $15,000 retainer.

Problem was he never did any appreciable work after that!  Our case was continued for about a year and one half.  That was good.  But once we were ready to go to trial, we learned he never read any of my numerous emails or reviewed key photographic evidence.

My husband had been charged with reckless burning and having a fire of greater diameter than 8 feet.  Critical fact was we had 4 digital time stamped photos and 2 in person witnesses that were there at the time the wildfire started and could prove we were not even burning.  Waylon wanted us to lie on the stand and called us liars.

Of course, Waylon was immediately fired.

Thankfully we hired another attorney who actually listened to us and did the requisite work.  She got the State Attorney to dismiss the reckless burning charges and he accepted a no contest adjudication withheld plea on the having a fire larger than 8 ft.

So hire Waylon if you want to pay $15,000 for about 3 hours of work.

I recently faced a legal situation in Florida after intervening in a domestic violence incident, which resulted in an assault charge and a Temporary Restraining Order (TRO) being filed against me. I turned to Mr. Sombathy of The Sombathy Law Firm for defense, and his strategic approach was reminiscent of the legal maneuvers in high-profile cases like that of Daniel Perry.

The TRO hearing was where Mr. Sombathy first demonstrated his legal prowess. Through an expert cross-examination, he masterfully exposed the inconsistencies and lies in the complainant's testimony. His incisive questioning not only dismantled the accusations but also led to the swift dismissal of the TRO, protecting my rights and setting a positive trajectory for the rest of the case.

Beyond the TRO, Mr. Sombathy continued to shine. He negotiated a pre-trial intervention that resulted in a total dismissal of the criminal charges against me. His negotiation skills, combined with his deep understanding of Florida law, ensured that justice was served and my case would not proceed to trial, avoiding further legal battles, financial burdens, and associated stress.

His approach was not just about winning in the courtroom but also about strategically navigating the legal system to achieve the best possible outcome. He effectively aligned my actions with Florida's Stand Your Ground principles, all without the need for a public trial.

For anyone in Florida facing complex legal issues, Mr. Sombathy at The Sombathy Law Firm is the attorney you need. His staff is professional, friendly and responsive and Mr. Sombathy’s ability to turn the tide through expert cross-examination and strategic negotiation was nothing short of remarkable.

Save yourself the money and either pay your fine or hire a lawyer who’s willing to fight for you.

reviews.text:
This review may be lengthy, but I would like to provide a comprehensive assessment of my experience with Alia Adhal. As I sought a divorce lawyer specializing in military divorces following a 21-year marriage, I had initially met with several lawyers, but it did not feel right due to various reasons. Upon visiting Alia Adhal's office, she was willing to sit down and attentively listen to my unique situation. She made a profound statement that has stayed with me to this day, stating "that a million things can change in 24 hours, and it is essential to take things one step at a time" . Notably, she did not discuss finances or costs, including the retainer, until the very end of our meeting. Unlike other lawyers I had met, her approach seemed less focused on financial aspects. We went over my situation, and throughout the 6 months that she was retained, she and her paralegal stayed with me every step of the way, kept me informed on what was going to be the next step in the process, even when we went to mediation.
When I say she's one of the strongest lawyers I've ever seen, she made sure to represent me and was not willing to settle for any of the demands put on by the other lawyer, and that is exceptional to me. Upon vacating the home we made sure to leave it clean and ready for occupancy and our deposit was returned in full less than a week later. I believe that as long as a tenant knows what their responsibilities and rights are, a landlord (who happens to be an attorney) understands the same of themselves it makes for a comfortable living situation. I never had to use Sister as an attorney but if I had I would assume she would work hard to do her best for me, whether or not we were friends. Her staff was always knowledgeable, respectful and helpful. Thank you for everything over the years and I hope the best for you all!

reviews.text: I highly recommend this firm. I was in a horrible accident and began with Roper Elrod who began attempting to settle my case against the insurance company. After numerous attempts, Mr Elrod was transparent and reviewed my case and bills and knew I wouldn't be fairly compensated with the insurance company's offer at that time without sending my case to the litigation team. This was unexpected for me since many attorneys want to be the one to finish the case themselves. I felt that Mr Elrod was honest and fair and had mine and my family's best interest in mind while working toward a goal. Shortly after sending my case to litigation, my next attorney, Muhammad Abdullaah, and his paralegal Erika began eagerly working my case and remained in touch with me thereafter about the progress. My phone calls and emails remained answered and questions were answered. Erika worked with the billing companies to continue to get clear totals of my totals I'd spent up to that point.  Even after the case, which Mr Abdullah was able to get settled with compensation much more fair than the insurance had originally been willing to negotiate; Erika remained in touch with me to follow up to ensure everything was handled. I have recommended the firm to friends and family members in the event they are ever faced with these same unfortunate circumstances. Thank you all for your hard work and for your honesty and willingness to help in completion. Your firm really makes a great team!
reviews.ownerResponse: Pamela, thank you for allowing us to help in your time of need. We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience and are glad we could help. Thank you for trusting Wettermark Keith!

It takes valuable time for our attorneys to review/research your issue in preparation for a consultation, plus time for the actual consultation, so a consultation fee applies; you were even informed about the consultation fee on August 4th. I was in a car accident last year, I was rear ended when I was a complete stop, my vehicle was totaled, my back, my neck and my left shoulder were in misery for days and months, I had to go to physical therapy, chiropractor, massage therapist, medical bills galore, but thankfully I had a great team of lawyers behind me, taking care of all the paper work, going back and forth with the insurance companies ( that’s not an easy job) and always keeping me updated, Marcus was always making sure that I was feeling good with the way he was handling things, checking on me to see if my therapies were working, always consulting me before any decision they had to make, always making me feel confident that we were going to win my case and that they were always fighting for what I deserved and for what it was best for me.

Today July 12, 2024 exactly a year and 2 months after my accident, we closed this chapter, we won my case, all my medical bills were paid, I’m a little under the weather and Marcus came all the way to my house to meet up with my husband and I and I can’t be anymore thankful to him everyone behind him at Perry and Young, for their wonderful work and dedication to their clients.

If you or any of your family members ever find yourselves in a situation like mine, don’t hesitate to contact Perry and Young, they will have your back 100% all the way until the end!!

Attorney James Dowgul was highly recommended to me in April, 2025 after I was arrested for a simple assault and battery in Bay County, Florida.  This unexpected incident resulted from an ongoing dispute I had with the president of the high-rise condo I own a unit in.

After being arrested at 10:00 p.m. and taken to the Bay County Jail, I was subsequently bonded out the next day at 3:30 p.m.  0bviously I was very upset,  being a retired 71-year-old commercial developer from The Woodlands, Texas.

The 20th floor unit I own was purchased as a vacation residence. The dispute I had with the Board president stemmed from my monthly fees increased $1,000/month shortly after he joined the board. That, with many other issues made me skeptical of his competentcy, which resulted in an acrimonious relationship. One that had been very friendly prior to the incident.

Upon hiring Mr Dowgul, I interviewed him in his office and found him to be very professional,  extremely versed in the law, and he gave me the confidence going forward to give me the confidence in him that he felt he could help me.

Mr Dowgul never promised me anything. He simply explained the procedures and the best case and worst case scenarios. That was exactly what I needed after such a traumatic experience.

An injunction was filed against me claiming I was a threat to the president and his family. Accordingly he was seeking a restraining order in addition to the charge of assault and battery, which allegedly took place at the Christmas party for all the owners in December, 2024.

Mr. Dowgul defended me during a "zoom" hearing with the judge and the claimant's attorney. The hearing took almost three hours, with eight witnesses being called including the wife and son of the president.

Needless to say, I had to endure 3 hours of defamatory testimony against me in a well coached and orchestrated scathing explanation of the claimant's reasons seeking a restraining order.

When it was Mr. Dowgu'sl time to cross examine the witnesses and defend me he was spectacular! Not only did he object at the prooer times, but he unveiled numerous tlibcidents of conflicting testimony.

Later that day I received a notice that the judge had ruled in my favor. And no injunction was put in place.

I still faced the possibility of a trial in late Jume. To Mr. Dowgul's credit, and his competency, he obtained a tape from the restaurant where the incident took place. He also got a "statement" from a witness who was present at the Christmas party dispelling the accusations.

As a result of Mr Dowgul's efforts, I received a 'no information" on June, 2nd 2025. This only week's after my arrest! I was ecstatic.

I highly recommended Mr. Dowgul and his assistant Kathleen, who was also so kind and reassuring to me during this stressful time. She always answered my calls, as dis Mr. Dowgul....which is RARE with lawyers. I know being in a high-powered industry that is litigious and requires hiring lawyers.

James Dowgul is the best lawyer I've had the pleasure to hire and meet. In a world where hiring a lawyer isn't always a pleasant experience, and is usually very expensive.

James Dowgul was very reasonable with his fee and I felt he was well worth the expense. I'm now considering a civil suit against the president. If I do so, I will call James Dowgul for a referral or use him if he feels he would be my best option going forward.

Bar none, the best in the business across the Florida panhandle. Of the six or so law offices I called/ left messages seeking representation, James is the only one who reached out in earnest. That call lasted maybe 10 mins, and that was all the time he needed to walk me through all the possible scenarios regarding my case.

My son, was picked up on a "fugitive from justice " charge in PCB, FL. They were holding him without bail for the State of AL to pick him up. He had lived in his own PCB house for 10 years and had just sold it. I guess they were too lazy to look for property in his own name, or to call him and let him know there was a warrant he needed to address in Auburn, AL. He graduated from Auburn University about 20+ years ago. He would've turned himself in. When they picked him up they took him to Bay County jail where he got very sick. He got flu, pneumonia, diarrhea, very high blood pressure, was coughing up blood, had nausea, couldn't lie down to sleep because he felt like he would choke to death on his own phlegm. He also had kidney and trachea damage. He tried to get help but they said he was faking it and ignored him. Attorney James Dowgul teleconferenced into his hearing to make sure my son signed the papers correctly and got a bond for him. Finally we could get him out of there! Of course after one night at home we brought him to the hospital. He's in the ICU having an emergency procedure done right now to remove fluids and pus from his lungs. I'm typing this as I'm sitting in the waiting room to hear from his doctor. If James Dowgul hadn't have helped my son and got him a set bail I've no doubt he'd be dead by now. Thank you James!!! You've saved my son and made me one happy mama. Well worth every penny I paid. He also followed up with us to make sure we got my son out of there. I hope I never have to, but if I did I'd hire James again in a heartbeat. Of course we still have to go to Auburn and settle the other warrant. God Bless 🇺🇸 America!!

Mr. James Dowgul is an incredible lawyer in every way. He took my case which I thought was going to be extremely difficult and made it a painless experience for me. If you are planning your estate and getting affairs in order  Christine O'Neil is your go to person!  She helped me see what need ed doing and put me at ease. She got all the paper work in order and at a very reasonable cost!  Highly recommend!

I can't thank Christine enough for her exceptional assistance during a challenging time in my life when my father fell ill.

Her expertise in preparing a Power of Attorney and subsequently creating a trust for my father's assets was truly remarkable. She was highly attentive to every detail, ensuring that my father's wishes were met and that his estate was protected.

What truly sets Christine apart is her dedication to her clients. She navigated the legal complexities with ease and was always available to address any concerns or questions we had. Her professionalism and empathy were evident throughout the entire process.

I highly recommend Christine to anyone seeking legal services related to estate planning. I am incredibly grateful for the peace of mind she has provided during this difficult time. Thank you, Christine!

If you are searching for a knowledgeable attorney who is versed in estate planning, elder law and probate, look no further.  Christine O’Neil is a must to have in your corner if you need legal advice in dealing with any kind of estate issues.  I live in Oklahoma and have a dear friend in Pensacola, FL that I was trying to help during a recent health crisis.  My friend’s sister had recently passed away and she had no other family member to assist her.  Living alone she reached out to me.

Having known my friend for over 40 years it became my duty and responsibility to assist her with health and end of life decisions.  I knew it would be a challenge living almost 1000 miles apart, so I began the search for a local attorney in Pensacola with experience, skills and above all, compassion to help manage this process.  My first assignment was to review and get my friends’ affairs in order.  That’s when Christine O’Neil stepped in with the legal knowledge to assist in preparing the legal documents required to designate myself her legal power of attorney to manage the day-to-day affairs plus make all the medical decisions required later on.

My friend was mentally sharp however her body was failing, and she was in a rehab facility at the time.  After our discussion Christine reached out to her and went over everything, answering her questions and making sure she understood.  Once the documents were ready, Christine personally went to the rehab facility to execute the documents, left copies with the facility, and sent me the originals.

Christine is professional and has a compassionate, caring way about her that is needed and appreciated during such stressful circumstances.  She listens, explains thoroughly each document, and always asked if I had any questions.  She responds in a timely manner to emails and always called me back if she wasn’t available when I called.  Finding Christine was the BEST thing for me in helping my friend.  I highly recommend her!

reviews.text: I highly recommend Lewis and Jurnovoy to anyone in need of financial assistance/bankruptcy filing. Mr. Lewis and Mr. Jurnovoy and their support staff are extremely professional and knowledgeable, while also being compassionate and caring, helping to make a difficult time and decision much easier to work through. From Day 1, I felt absolutely confident that I had made the correct choice in my legal representation. (As a former Paralegal of 25 years, I'm not easily impressed so quickly.) Mr. Jurnovoy put me at ease in our first meeting, making the process much easier for me. His assistant, Terri made sure that I had all of the information I needed to get my part of the job done so they, in turn, could do theirs. Although not an easy decision, their kindness and compassion made the process so much easier. Mr. Jurnovoy was careful to explain everything clearly so that I had no questions as the case moved along. His office checked in with me regularly to ensure that I was up to date on the status of the matter. They were awesome! Mr. Jurnovoy even called to check on me after the Court hearing to make sure I was okay. (Not a standard business practice in today's world.) They definitely have "the personal touch". Again, I highly recommend Lewis and Jurnovoy, as they truly have your best interests at heart. You won't be disappointed should you choose to work with them!

In late Feb 2025 my mom was involved in a MVA, a hit and run case; luckily the hit and runner was caught a few days later. However we thought it was going to be a complete loss and that person would not have been found, but thank God he was. My mom was very lucky she survived this horrible accident. She told me she wanted to speak to a lawyer to seek advice and help with her situation. Her car was totaled and she did suffer minor injuries on top of PTSD and other mental health issues.
She saw the ad for Bruner law on tv and decided to go there. When I called to make the appointment for our first consultation, the receptionist, Jennifer was very nice and had a great attitude. On our first consultation we were greeted with positive attitude and smiling faces.
When we met Mr Bruner, he also greeted us with a positive attitude, very respectful and polite. He was very informative and explained the process in terms we understood. He also listened to my mom, who has a slight language barrier. He did not rush us and gave us his undivided attention.
Also, during this process I was in contact with Samantha Jones, who is the legal assistant. She was very informative as well and made sure to keep in contact, answering our phone calls and emails promptly.
We are finally able to put this part behind us and our case was resolved in a timely fashion.
Thank you to all at the Bruner Law firm for helping us through this challenging time.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are glad you had a good experience working with us! It was a pleasure to work with you and your Mom. Please give us a call anytime we can be of service. All the best to you and your family! -Vincent Bruner

reviews.text: Prompt responses, professional yet friendly and outgoing.  Chad helped us with our estate planning - Trust, wills, advanced directives, and medical powers of attorney for my husband and myself.  Planning for one's own demise can be daunting and uncomfortable but Chad put us at ease from the moment we met him and he made this a super easy experience for us. He listened to what our intentions are and followed them to the letter.  We never once felt rushed in either our initial consultation or in reviewing drafts, responding with updates, or with getting our documents signed.  We first met with Chad in September 2023 and had our final signing of our documents in January 2024 -- the delay was entirely on our end as we had to do a bit of soul searching and figuring out what exactly we were trying to convey.  We have specific requirements for our beneficiary of the trust which I understood in my own mind but had a bit of trouble articulating properly. Chad listened to us and ultimately was able to document those perfectly.  We will continue to seek his counsel for any additional estate planning needs going forward and we would most definitely recommend this office for any legal services.  His office staff is also exceptional, particularly his Legal Assistant, Hannah Stephens, who was extremely helpful.  Overall, we just couldn't be more pleased with the services we received from this firm.

reviews.text:
I have thought a lot about posting this review, but my experience with this law firm, specifically Elizabeth Peskin, was so extremely disappointing due to lack of preparation, poor communication, and significant clerical errors that I had to share my personal recent experience.
A motion filed on my behalf contained basic mistakes that should never happen in a professional legal filing but the courtroom representation following it was the most disappointing part of the experience with Ms. Peskin.
This law firm (Elizabeth Peskin) was retained for a circuit court motion filing and representation. I was not emailed, nor texted the motion to be reviewed before filing it with the clerks office on my behalf. I was not even informed of the filing by her or her staff. I happened to look at the clerk of courts website myself days after it had been filed to see the motion listed. The motion was incorrectly filed listing a total different name than mine as well as the fact that one of the case numbers included in the motion had already been fully resolved and should not have been part of the filing at all. This error itself appeared to create confusion before the court by introducing information that was not relevant to the matter being heard and negatively impacted how the motion was viewed. This error alone solidified a denial by the court.
Communication from Ms. Peskin and her staff to me was very poor leading up to the hearing. I was instructed to attend court, which I did, yet Ms. Peskin did not consult with me before the hearing, did not speak with me during the hearing, and after the judge denied the motion, did not approach me to explain what happened. The only time any conversation was had that day was because I approached her myself outside of the courtroom as she was exiting the courthouse to ask what had just transpired.
Despite being present in the courtroom as instructed, I was never called forward or included in any meaningful way regarding my own case. Additionally, Ms. Peskin appeared unprepared regarding the important facts surrounding both my case and the motion that was filed on my behalf. There was no clear demonstration during the hearing that the key details, background, or supporting information necessary to properly advocate for the motion had been adequately reviewed or presented. Based on this experience, it felt like my matter was treated as just another routine filing rather than something that deserved proper preparation and advocacy.
Clients depend on their attorneys for preparation, accuracy, communication, and representation in court. Unfortunately, my experience did not reflect those expectations.
I would strongly encourage anyone considering this firm to make sure they are getting clear communication and that their case is being handled with the level of diligence and preparation they deserve. I wasn’t and now truly regret my choice of representation.

The team at Shepard law is amazing!

Elizabeth was truly a god send.

She handled everything beautifully and quickly.  She also listened to me when I had a few emotional breakdowns.

Thank you Elizabeth, from the bottom of my heart.

Keep up the great work!

Larry Perry is a liar and Ted Howell has no killer instinct. They couldn't even get the video footage at the traffic light nor listen to my needs and concerns in a timely fashion. They waited me out for almost a year until I had nothing left. I had no choice but to accept the insurance money out of desperation, which didn't even cover the first ER bill of over 131K. They always called me from their personal cell phones, make promises they never kept, I signed documents under duress and my TBI and Wallerian Degeneration is only the tip of the iceberg. Do yourself a favor and hire Morgan & Morgan because they win cases identical to my case and actually CARE!

So grateful I found Perry & Young! It was such a joy working with Larry and his team. They were all professional, caring, and very communicative. It really gave me good peace of mind that the team was so thorough, which gave me the time to focus on healing from the accident. There is no way I would have been able to do any of that on my own. If you need a great personal injury legal team, give them a call! I'm certainly referring them to anyone that needs help after an accident.
Best injury law firm in Panama City FL.
I can’t recommend them enough! If you get into a car accident come here!

I am highly satisfied with the service they’ve provided for me. Everyone at Perry and Young is very kind and professional. They get back to you very quickly As well. Kelly Roberson is my lawyer and she’s been very helpful with my case, had things move quickly & got me the best possible outcome for my settlement. I will be recommending them to everyone I know moving forward.

Ted Howell is a brilliant personal injury attorney. He has an incredible ability to distill complex issues into actionable strategies, and his guidance left me more confident and inspired. If he brings even a fraction of this dedication and brilliance to his clients, they are undoubtedly in excellent hands. Highly recommend!

Called to schedule a free consultation regarding my potential medical case. Front desk lady said that someone will contact me to get more details about my case and discuss my situation. In 3 days received email which said “After one of our attorneys carefully reviewed the information provided on your intake it is our decision that we will not be able to assist you in this matter”. I don’t understand what “careful review” means because I provided zero details about my situation. So, they didn’t even try. And seems like they didn’t want to try. Very disappointed.
Brian Connors! This guy made it seamless. If you need a lawyer GO TO HIM! #Perry&Young
Perry & Young were very beneficial in making our annual benefit fishing tournament a success!

I have nothing but great things to say about this Law firm, specially about Marcus ( he was the lawyer who took over my case)

I was in a car accident last year, I was rear ended when I was a complete stop, my vehicle was totaled, my back, my neck and my left shoulder were in misery for days and months, I had to go to physical therapy, chiropractor, massage therapist, medical bills galore, but thankfully I had a great team of lawyers behind me, taking care of all the paper work, going back and forth with the insurance companies ( that’s not an easy job) and always keeping me updated, Marcus was always making sure that I was feeling good with the way he was handling things, checking on me to see if my therapies were working, always consulting me before any decision they had to make, always making me feel confident that we were going to win my case and that they were always fighting for what I deserved and for what it was best for me.

Today July 12, 2024 exactly a year and 2 months after my accident, we closed this chapter, we won my case, all my medical bills were paid, I’m a little under the weather and Marcus came all the way to my house to meet up with my husband and I and I can’t be anymore thankful to him everyone behind him at Perry and Young, for their wonderful work and dedication to their clients.

If you or any of your family members ever find yourselves in a situation like mine, don’t hesitate to contact Perry and Young, they will have your back 100% all the way until the end!!
Such a pleasure to work with!
The best staff and legal team that I have ever met.   Ted Howell and his team set the gold standard for legal representation.  I am grateful to have met this group!
The best law firm in Marianna! - Levi & Paige Baggett.
Mr. Larry Perry has taken good care of my friends in times of need. Got them swift settlements and on the road to healing, quicker than ever. They are DEFINITELY on your side and will fight for YOU!!
Amazing law firm full of wonderful people!

Perry and Young represent my family after a tragic accident. Perry and Young & the entire staff were kind, timely, and professional. I would highly recommend Perry and Young should you find yourself needing legal representation!

I have used Perry and Young for a car accident I was in. They were always easy to get ahold of anytime I had a question. They helped the process so much smoother for my family and I. We would suggest them to anyone needing assistance!!!
If you need help with your injury case. Perry and Young will get the job done efficiently and with unparalleled professionalism. 5 stars.
I appreciate Chris and the firm for radio support of our student athletes. Thanks from Deep South Sports Broadcasting!

Working with Les, Marcus, and Ileene was the smoothest process we could have asked for. We were nervous at first, but we couldn't have been taken care of better. This was our very first-time needing lawyers in our lives, and we couldn't have made a better decision for ourselves and our family. Communication was on point! Super happy with the outcome and left with new relationships that we were not expecting that we hope to continue into the future. I would recommend Perry & Young to anybody needing a determined, caring, and family-oriented lawyer(s). THANK YOU, LES, MARCUS, AND ILEENE! YOU ALL ARE AMAZING!
Even the front desk women were super courteous and helpful!

I would like to thank Ted Howell, Trina Burch and Donna Krisko on  a outstanding job on a vehicle accident in which I was injured in. Due to being out of town, I knew no one and chose them by excellent reviews. I was treated so kind from all I came in contact with. Thank you Perry & Young,
I love them!! They’ve been nothing but supportive towards myself and my community!

Perry & Young, P.A. is an amazing attorney. They support many local clubs and school organizations around the Panhandle of Florida, including my FFA chapter at Cottondale High School. They are very friendly people and are willing to help EVERYONE in their community.
The staff is very caring about helping their clients. There was great communication between us and they kept me informed on all changes. I would highly recommend them for your lawyer services.
Do not recommend Ryan hobbs was very rude and rushed me off the phone

This law firm cares.  It’s unlike any other firm I have experienced in my professional or personal life.   Perry and Young stand heads and shoulders above the other firms. Ted Howell and Kris Harper are outliers in their industry.  Hire them.
Brian made the process easy. Kay made sure to answer our emails quickly and in a timely manner.
Kristin Harp was absolutely amazing to work with! Would 100% recommend Perry and Young to anyone because of her professional courtesy and easy to work with attitude. Thank you so much!

This firm is Grade “A” from the ladies at the front to Kay and Donna all the way up to Brian! They are regular people that take the time to ensure YOU feel valued as their client. No matter how big or small a question, Donna ensured that I had an answer! They definitely aren’t slipping when it come to looking after your best interest. If you are looking for a team that will go to bat for you regarding your case, I HIGHLY suggest setting a consultation up with them. You won’t find anywhere else in the county to treat you like family and get the best results! I appreciate you all.

Ted and Kris  are incredible! After being hit by a Mac truck and totaling out my car I was mortified! Thankfully an associate recommended Ted @ Perry and young! This saved my life. It’s so unfortunate how common people don’t know how simple it can be to obtain a great lawyer! They made this process seem stress free! I was able to focus on my health while they focused on the legal side of things. They informed me of every step along the way. If I had any questions I had a direct line to both Ted and Kris. They are very welcoming and while they treat you like family, they are also professional. They are highly recommended! Thanks so much Ted & Kris!
-The Cox family
#teamted&kris
Though they couldnt take my case, they were patient, polite, and wrote a very compassionate letter to me explaining why.
Marcus Green was magnificent and he had a lot of energy and was very open with questions that we all had for him!
Marcus green is absolutely amazing

Mr. Hunter did a terrible job on my husband's custody case. We wasted $5K and over a year and a half of our time. Mr Hunter and his office were extremely difficult to work with and get ahold of, did not show any compassion or empathy, was rude on multiple occasions, and did not fight or advocate for my husband at all. We ended up having to hire another attorney and are much happier with our new attorney. We do NOT recommend this attorney. Please consider this before hiring Mr Hunter for your legal issues.

Do not hire this law firm. I called for consultation and the lady that answered the phone was very unprofessional and tired.  I could barely hear her and when I asked her to repeat what she whispered,  she yelled at me and hung up the phone. I would never hire them to represent me in any case.

This attorney does not mind pushing out fraudulent paperwork to Immigration for the money.  My estranged wife hired Michael Hunter after hiring and attempting to hire many other Immigration Attorney's to push her fraudulent documents and photos through to Immigration for her Green Card. Michael Hunter never validated any of the information that she gave to his assistant Julie S. Tidwell. After I withdrew my Petition for my wife because she cheated on me and got a Domestic Violence call for getting beat up by her  boyfriend from her country that she had been in a relationship with 6 months after we got married. My wife got her boyfriend arrested but dropped the charges. I have not lived with her since Sept. 2022. Now that I have withdrew my Petition for her Green Card she hired Michael Hunter to push her falsified documents and photos through to Immigration claiming VAWA. Now she is claiming that I abused her. I don't have no background of abuse at all. I was never around when her when she is claiming the abuse supposedly happened.  I have tried to contact Michael Hunter and his assistant to send in proof of fraud but Julie S. Tidwell replied to me that I was a stalker and a abuser. That is harassing my wife. When all I'm trying to do is prove that she is a fraudster and a scammer try to run to America because she defrauded the government in the Cayman Islands and Owe unpaid taxes in her country.  She is very untrustworthy.  So 2 days after I called their office I received a call from the police stating that I was harassing them and my wife. This is sad and unjust that these Immigration attorney's are accepting these fraudsters as clients and pushing falsified paperwork so that these criminals can claim abuse for VAWA. My character has been destroyed and my information that I have requested for my wife not to use is being used to get her VAWA.  I am now taking legal action against this law office and my wife for fraud. Be cautious when hiring this attorney if you are not a scammer or fraudster.

Hiring Michael Hunter as my attorney for my custody case for my children was one of the biggest mistakes I have ever made. This was my first time ever hiring and dealing with an attorney and I made the mistake of missing the red flags and paying for it later. I wasted a year and a half of my time and $5,000. Mr. Hunter's paralegal, Linda, was rude and disrespectful to me on multiple occasions. She had a difficult time keeping up with communication and contact. She would often "lose" emails from me. I would go months without hearing anything back from their office. At one point the longest I went without hearing anything from them was 6 months. When I asked for help coming up with my counter offer, I was told by Linda "we aren't here to figure out what you want for you." I knew exactly what I wanted, but I had questions and needed guidance on a few issues, and I could not confidently ask them for legal advice or guidance throughout the process. After retaining Mr. Hunter I only ever saw or spoke with him one time which was at my mediation. I never saw or spoke to him again. I have a strong case and Mr Hunter didnt care to go over any evidence or actually fight for me. He told me information at my consultation that ended up not being true. When I asked him again at my mediation, he told me that he never said that and gaslit me. Him and his paralegal both have bad attitudes and had difficulty showing empathy. I never felt as though they genuinely cared about me or the outcome of my case. Communication with them was difficult. Trying to get guidance was even more difficult. I ended up having to hire a new attorney. The difference is night and day and I now realize that my feelings with Mr Hunter and his office were valid all along. I am not having any of the same issues I had with him, with my new attorney. My new attorney shows empathy and compassion. I have direct communication with her and have already had multiple consultations with her to go over my case. My new attorney and her law office have been extremely helpful with the entire process. All things I did not have before with Mr Hunter. I now feel confident going forward with my custody case, something I did not feel before. I am not a wealthy man and having to pay for another lawyer after already paying for one, has been extremely difficult for me. To this day, I still have not heard back from Mr Hunter's office after months of waiting for an email back for an appointment to go over my counter offer and eventually just hiring a new attorney. He never reached out to me, but he did make sure to reach out to the opposing counsel. If I could give them 0 stars, I would. Please think twice before hiring this attorney.

BEST OFFICE EVER. I had such a great experience with Mr. Hunter and his assistant during my divorce process.  All my questions and concerns were answered, and I felt supported through the whole process.  Highly recommend this office.

Worst attorney and team I’ve ever met. DO NOT HIRE THEM. After a good consultation it went down hill quickly. The first zoom court meeting with my ex husband I arrived 30 min early to review our case and be prepared only to have Mr. Hunter walk in late and couldn’t find the zoom information, then yelling at me as we are trying to connect to the court meeting stating that I withheld information which I did not, it was in my paperwork and we could have reviewed it before this last second. This was the first time.
Then I have requested several times for discovery documents, and nothing was filed on my behalf with the courts And I was not taken seriously.
After this we had mediation scheduled And my ex-husband’s attorney was pushing and request requesting a lot of things and there was no pushback or support Mr Hunter attorney at all.
I came In for another meeting to discuss going to trial, and Mr. Hunter was late again, walked in talking about how he needed to contact his doctor to get his pills Then walked out out of the meeting I abruptly, and I did not speak to him again we got nothing accomplished or prepared.
A court date has been set for a zoom call that was very important to our case. Mr. Hunter and his team sent me one email that I did not open telling me of this court date… When the court date came around, I was completely unaware of it having not acknowledged or responded to the email with my children for a sports competition… Mr. Hunter attended the zoom case without me, and in the same case he withdrew from represented me without me having any knowledge of this at all.

They literally did nothing, NOTHING for my case but wasted time and money and made me look stupid on top of disrespecting my time. They are a fraud

I really don't know where to start?? We have been raising our grandson ever since he was 6 months old. As grandparents we were always told that here in the state of Florida grandparents have no rights when it comes to visitation or adoption? We were trying for the longest time to adopt him, and was referred by several other law firms that Michael Hunter was the best one for the job. We lost our daughter a year ago, and the blood father immediately tried to get a pickup order for him. We hired Mr. Hunter and that day he immediately put a stop to it! Then the long court case started. The father was a bad seed and we were terrified of him getting his hands on him. Mr. Hunter worked diligently non stop to file for an immediate adoption for us to end the nightmare. In the end we were victorious and now have full custody of him (now 10 yrs old). Mr. Hunter even got his birth certificate handled removing this badman from it forever, listing us as his mother and father!! I can't thank Mr. hunter and his office team enough for what they did for us and especially our grandson!! I believe completely in my heart that he saved our grandson from a hell on this earth that he would have been facing the rest of his life!! Thank you Mr Hunter you are a Hero!!!

My case has a Private investigator who has begun to direct me as to who I need to contact and informed me I have a clear case,
that needs the attention of a family Law attorney .

The Lady who answered the phone was hard to hear and had a attitude when I sed I could barley hear her.

she would not allow me to finish the answers to the questions she was asking, without cutting me off,
and when i continued to talk threw her to finish my response she began "Shouting" at me  , at which point I stopped to let her finish and I sed I was no longer going to do business with this firm.

Constructive words...  Shouting at a potential client attempting to get a consultation is probably not great for Business.  Good luck !

Micheal, Julie and the rest of the team, THANK YOU from DOMINIUE and KENROY. This was a journey for us , but you guys were very Diligent, Relentless, Professional and Friendly and saw us through to the end. You guys are the BEST.
THANK YOU 🙏🏻
Micheal Hunter was fantastic. My brother was charged with a shotty DUI in Panama City Beach and Mr. Hunter made sure justice was served; just like he said he would do! Innocent!

Absolutely 💯 one of the best immigration lawyer.
I used him to get my mother citizenship she is 87 years old and he was not only a good lawyer but a caring person.
He did everything for my mom from the beginning to the end and it was nice to have someone that care about elder person and knew his job and the people in Immigration, we did not feel lost.
💯 recommended.

My husband hired Michael Hunter during a custody battle several years ago after our previous lawyer suddenly stopped returning calls once he had decided to settle out of court. Mr. Hunter was wonderful and helped my husband understand what needed to be done and facilitated everything. Mr. Hunter came highly recommended by a dear friend and I am so glad my husband hired him.
If you need help with immigration or family law, I highly recommend Michael Hunter.
Good guy just kinda high in price. His a paralegal had a very bad attitude. Did very little for me in my case.

Michael Hunter and his office staff are professional, kind and caring people. They've worked on 2 different cases for me and both were successful. I appreciate everything you've done for me. Always available and affordable pricing.

You'll not regret retaining such a diligent man.

Adam was amazing when working on my car injury case! I have always been skeptical when it comes to lawyers but he has completely changed my mind. With his help I was able to heal and not worry about the bills stacking up. Thank you Adam for this experience and your expertise!

Honest, trustworthy, knowledgeable, integrity, these are just a few ways to describe Adam Anderson.  He worked many hours on my wife's case and always kept us informed.  He never promised anything he couldn't deliver which I appreciated.  It is rare to find skilled AND honest lawyers but, he is just that.  My wife and I are privileged to call him our lawyer and friend now.  He is truly one of the best!

Adam is a great attorney who will fight for what you deserve. I suffered a serious leg injury in a bike accident 5 hours away from home. I was referred to Adam by another local attorney who categorized him as professional, hard working, and tenacious. This turned out to be fully accuarate. Adam stayed in close contact with me during the year-long process, and was able to negotiate an excellent recovery. He was always reachable and made me feel comfortable and well-cared for. I would highly recommend Adam Anderson Law Firm.

Adam has done a amazing job representing me, respecting me, listening to me, and helping me for the past year, even when I didn’t know what I needed or even wanted. I couldn’t barley leave the house my overprotective sister from Tallahassee had to find me a lawyer and fast because I was hit on my motorcycle by someone with almost no coverage. She went through numerous lawyers and she said she heard nothing but good things about Adam. So we had him come by and I knew then we were going to see this thing through. So it’s a year later from the day I was hit and we have settled the lawsuit, fast and somewhat painlessly. He went out of his way for me in so many different ways. He is truly god sent!                               Thank you Adam!

I was referred to Adam by a friend and I am so thankful for the referral! Adam was very professional and guided me through the entire legal process explaining everything to me in terms that were very understandable. When I had questions, I appreciated the fact that I could call him at any time, and he would be the one directly answering my call. Not only did Adam represent me legally, but he was also personable and truly went to every effort to make sure I was okay and receiving the services I needed following my accident. Even though I lived several hundreds of miles away from his firm, Adam handled everything regarding my case and was organized and proactive every step of the way. It is clear he puts his clients first and his hard work definitely shows!
Adam always goes above and beyond for his clients! Very professional and efficient! We recommend him to everyone!

Most honest hard working place I’ve ever had the pleasure to step foot in! I’ll be back for sure even just to hang out
You gain knowledge and money just by walking threw the door! 🙌🏻 👍🏼
Adam is a great attorney! We’ve worked together for a long time. You will not find a better attorney!

Loved working with Adam and his firm. Every step of the way he was there talking through all of my options and listening to what I had to say. Would not go to anyone else and highly recommend. He takes the time and makes sure to get the job done!
All around great guy. Tenacious lawyer. I give my highest recommendation.

Adam Anderson Law Firm is pure class.  Adam deals directly with all potential clients and clients himself.  He works tirelessly and passionately to obtain justice for each and every one of his clients.  He is the true definition of a professional and always puts his clients first.

If you are looking for an excellent lawyer, look no further. I was injured and didn’t know what to do. Adam handled everything, all I had to do is work at getting better. He made sure I was taken care and got me more than I expected!

I’ve dealt with lawyers before only to meet with roadblock after roadblock. Adam was great! Professional and courteous! Gave me 24/7 service, answered all my questions quickly and efficiently, and handled my case with such ease! Would definitely recommend!

Adam is passionate about his cases. He spends countless hours devoted to getting the best result for his clients. He has learned from the best and worked with the best and can absolutely be trusted with your case.

reviews.text: Mr. Dennis is a great attorney! He has represented me on many different occasions and is always there when I need him. Very reliable and he stays on top of everything needed for the case. He doesn't overcharge and handles the case in a very proficient/ successful manor.

While Going Through Every Single Attorney In Bay County Chipley And All Surrounding Areas I Stumbled Opon Mr Dennis. Let Me Tell You I Have Hired Mr Dennis For My Fiancee And My Self And Would Recommend To Anyone And Everyone. He's Flexible When It Comes To Payment, He's Very familiar with all the states attorney's, which is a must, He's Available Almost 24/7 I Can't Think Of A Time That I Had A Question and Texted Him Or Emailed Him An He Didn't Answer Right Back. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED ! I Was Absolutely 100 Percent Satisfied with his services.

If you are looking for a team that knows Family Law inside and out, and is willing to support and guide you through what is possibly the hardest time of your life, I have 100% confidence that Don Dennis  and his team is the right choice.
He Did Great! Also pricing is great and he will actually work with you.
Professional, trustworthy!

Mr. Dennis is top notch. He was very friendly and easy to get in touch with and communicate with. Thankfully my case was dismissed due to no show on the plaintiff, but Mr. Dennis was prepared and would have no doubt destroyed the case against me.
Bad

Month out for appointments, It's well worth the wait👏. Adam hood and his staff care.
Went through paperwork with us, (Explained lawyer  Language). Answered all of our questions
Adam hood is there for his
clients. Down-to-earth Person.
Thank you for everything
Adam Hood was extremely efficient in the handling of all my affairs.  If I had questions he or hid staff were always there to help.
Great staff and environment. Highly recommend.
Conscientious counsel and advice
Several years ago tried to get a caregiver contract drawn up for my aging father in law. Never received the contract or got a call back

Lost my business immediately with return call from my voicemail. The guy sounded like it was a total disservice to speak to me, like I ruined his day by trying to set up a consultation.

I didn’t get a name, but the unwelcoming tone and mocking my hello was too over the top for me to not say something about it.

Adam was a great help in preparing our will and power of attorney.  He suggested a way for us to do it we didn’t know about. So thank you Adam!   The staff is friendly, knowledgeable and fast. I would and have already recommended Adam Hood Law Firm
In Panama City.
Adam hood did a great job for us on our wills, power of attorneys and  living wills. He was very reasonable and had great ideas and insight into what we should do. I would recommend him 100%.
We were looking for no nonsense estate planning, but wanted to ensure that we covered all legal bases. Mr Hood and his staff are professional, kind and prompt! We would definitely recommend.
Excellent, honest and reasonable attorney, for quality family planning documents.

Very nice law firm and reasonable.
Two visit & what we needed done is done.
Adam has done a great job helping us with our legal needs, from setting up trusts and updating our wills to helping establish LLC's.
Efficient. Friendly. Highly recommended to me in the first place.
Very professional and knowledgeable.  An expert in Wills, Trusts and Estates. Fair pricing.

I want to give a shout-out to attorney Adam  Hood and his paralegal Jessica Harris and the rest of the Hood office staff for their superlative response to a timely need for a friend today.  We had been working with Jessica on it for a few weeks, but circumstances had suddenly become pressing and the work needed to be fast forwarded a few days.  All was completed and everyone can rest easy knowing everything necessary is in place to address the need. Great job, friends!  This is my third experience with them and all work has been handled with great care and understanding.

I have spoken to the attorney a few times and mainly interacted with his administrative staff who fails to give full instruction.  When I complained about his administrative assistant failing to follow up, this assistant started having a cold shoulder of mannerisms towards me.  How can a person get mad about truth in   facts? Unbelievable!

In my opinion, once they get your money all quality service goes down hill.  If you want things done a certain way, the assistant pushes for it to be done in the method that is less work for them.  You are better off looking else where for legal services in my opinion.
Pretty straight forward and quick and a pretty damn good lawyer. Highly recommend!!!
Adam is quick professional and reliable for all your probate wills and trust needs!

Adam does excellent work. He is to the point and no bs and his prices are very reasonable for the detail of work he does. If you have any estate issues I would highly suggest talking to Mr. Hood, he saved me a lot of money and headache.
Really nice guy. Secretary was very friendly as well. Would recommend him, he was very helpful.
Always helpful! Thank you!
Good
Excellent food.
Absolutely Great! Mr. Hood answered all of our questions and made this process so easy for us we would highly recommend his services.

Perfect. We came from out of town to discuss estate matters. We were able to schedule an appt quickly and Mr. Hood provided answers to all our questions along with suggestions, recommendations, and options.
Very personable friendly guy very informative and fits my needs perfectly
Was very helpful and gave my family great advice.  Would highly recommend

I asked if they were taking new clients and I was told they were. When I took off work, found a sitter for my children, paid said sitter and went in for my appointment i was referred out. Not only was this a complete waste of my time, Mr. Hood stared at my paperwork like it was foreign to his profession.  I didnt feel he was very competent and was rather rude. I wasn't sure if it was because he was embarrassed or that is just his unfortunate personality.  It seems they are only interested in the consultation fee which is why I am assuming I was told they were taking new clients. I was told any consulation fee would be waved, as if there was anything even done to earn billable time. They even called to remind me, the new client, that I had an appointment. That would tell me they are taking new clients, no? The office itself is a run down old home with "parking" in the half gravel half grass back yard. I only gave 1 star because zero stars was not an option.
Quick efficient, knowledgeable.
Great consultation!! Talks to you so you can understand..not all legal jumbo...very personable
Adam and his Team did a great job of meeting my needs and was very prompt.
His staff have been super helpful in answering my questions about the cost and filing Probate in Florida!

This is our 2nd time using Adam Hood. The 1st time was perfect and they accommodated us qith us living out of town. 2nd time has also went well (so far) but anticipate the 2nd time going as smoothly as the 1st.
Very helpful and reasonable
Caring, kind, professional, knowledgeable, courteous staff and attorney. Extremely helpful!

So far they've been very helpful and very friendly. They're making something very complicated very convenient. So far I am very impressed and will be making them my permanent solution to all my legal needs.
Sarah does the best title work in Bay County, handles probates and other legal matters with ease and professionalism. I love working with her, as do my clients!
Sarah is amazing to work with!!
Highly recommend working with Sarah Hess - she's always on top of it, and catches potential issues with closing before they actually could delay the closing. Great to work with!
Did my closing at this office and went as smoothly as anyone wants. courteous and professional staff.
He handled our business efficiently.
Awesome service!
Great office.
Great service
Sarah Hess is very professional and she communicates very well.  Warning... this place closes every day from noon to 1 for lunch. I wish they had a mail slot in the door!

He has no integrity at all. He has continued to mishandle the probate for my deceased brother. He was given money to pay off all debt and to this day has not paid it off, nor has he taken the state to probate. My brother passed in August of 2014, and 8 years later, it is not resolved. He basically has stolen the money given to him. The family now has been told to call the Florida Bar.

His secretary is extremely rude, and she lies. Every time you try to call and talk to Brian Hess, she tells you he is not in the office (or so she says).

I would not recommend him to anyone. He is a disgrace to the profession. I really hope the Florida Bar Association can do something to help our family.
Always very kind and professional with me
Very good at what he does
Good honest LAWYER

DO NOT USE THIS FIRM! The Secretary has NO KNOWLEDGE of certain things, told me she wasnt a Lawyer but tried telling me what was against the law and tried fussing with me on the phone AFTER Brian Hess , myself, and My Husband sat down and discussed the law. We paid them $1200.00 and for 3 days called, left messages and she said we were liars we didnt leave messages. Very rude, hung up on me and my husband. We got our money back. They do not have a damn clue about Landlord Tenant laws. Brian seemed very lazy and didnt want to return calls.
great brian

Very unprofessional. They will not return calls or answer emails. They failed to do what they promised. The only thing that they are good at is taking your money. I was very disappointed. This is the worst experience that I have ever had. They know or care nothing about customer service! Do not use them unless you just want to give your money away with zero results. I would not recommend them to my worst enemy. I would rather deal with a snake oil salesman! Stay away from this attorney. Do not use!
Unprofessional. Would not hire him ever again!
Superb..listened to my request for help.
I have worked with Steve and Brian for over fifteen years. Great attorneys who care about their clients, and it shows!
